message:
chore(beads): sync 112 new issues from stub/deadlock/mock triage pass

The swarm's latest audit sweep filed 112 tracking issues into .beads/issues.jsonl,
covering remaining stubs, todo!() placeholders, and suspected concurrency hazards
found across the crate surfaces. Breakdown by convention-prefixed title:

  - 89 STUB-*     (RSTUB-NNNN codegen.rs / connection.rs sites — CodegenError::Unsupported
                   and NOT_IMPL escapes that still route queries through fallbacks.
                   Tagged to SURF-SQL-CORE-001, SURF-EXT-FTS5-015, etc.)
  - 5  DEADLOCK-* (flat_combining_page_locks nested lock patterns and related
                   reentrant-lock suspects)
  - 3  MOCK-*     (todo!() integration test sites, e.g. materialize.rs:1084 B-tree
                   split trigger)
  - 15 remaining  (bug/epic/test items from the same pass — unwrap audits, perf
                   hotspots, conformance gaps)

Breakdown by beads issue_type:
  - 94 task
  - 14 bug
  -  2 epic
  -  2 test

No changes to working code — this is pure issue-store bookkeeping so the swarm
has claimable work in `br ready` and `bv --robot-triage` on the next tick.
Consistent with recent chore(beads) sync cadence and leaves rust_out (build
artifact) and .swarm_marching_orders.md (ephemeral swarm briefing) untouched.
